{"society_power": 3.0, "state_power": 3.0, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Independence declared amid caudillo instability and O'Higgins's fall", "reasoning": "Following independence (1818), the new Chilean state was fragile, dependent on military strongmen and lacking consolidated administration or reliable revenue, while O'Higgins's authoritarian rule and his 1823 overthrow left weak, elite-dominated institutions. Civil society was thin\u2014dominated by a small landed and merchant elite with little autonomous associational life, press, or popular mobilization capacity."}
